objective: Refactor lib toward explicit entrypoint facades plus focused shared contracts/helpers. Root keeps app.dart compatibility facade and app/main entrypoints; implementation lives under app/, core/, features/, router/, shared/, testing/, theme/. Extracted E2EMockChannel from lib/main_e2e.dart to lib/testing/e2e_mock_channel.dart so the root e2e entrypoint remains thin.
